{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Representative",
  "description": "Excel and Grace Consulting is a fast-paced business consulting organization with a track record of delivering exceptional business solutions to small and medium-scale enterprises in Nigeria, Ghana, Germany, Switzerland, Canada, etc. We are certified management consultants with the International Council of Management Consulting Institutes (CMC-Global) with over 18 years of experience. Our team of experts and consultants have authored over 20 books on business management, business structure, business operations, human resources, organizational structure, employee development, money management, and so on.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Sales Representative is responsible for generating leads, building client relationships, and achieving sales targets.
	This role involves identifying customer needs, presenting suitable products or services, and closing sales to help grow the business.
	An ideal candidate is goal-oriented, persuasive, and has excellent interpersonal skills.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive, process, and confirm customer orders via phone, whatsapp, email, website, and in-person visits.
	Conduct field visits to pharmacies, hospitals, clinics, and distributors to generate new orders.
	Promote company products and communicate ongoing promotions to customers.
	Achieve assigned sales targets and expand customer base.
	Follow up on pending payments and outstanding invoices.
	Maintain accurate records of orders, customer interactions, and sales activities.
	Provide market feedback on competitor pricing and customer demand trends.
	Coordinate with warehouse/logistics to ensure timely order fulfillment.


Qualifications


	Candidates should possess a Degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field is preferred but not always required with 3-5 years of experience
	Proven work experience as a Sales Representative or similar role.
	Highly motivated and target-driven with a proven track record in sales.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to create and deliver presentations tailored to the audience needs.


Salary
N250,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@eandg.com.ng&nbsp;or:&nbsp;eandg.tprecruiters@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-03-31",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Excel and Grace Consulting"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "195611"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 250000,
      "maxValue": 400000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"

Sales Representative Job at Excel and Grace Consulting




        
    

        
        Excel and Grace Consulting is a fast-paced business consulting organization with a track record of delivering exceptional business solutions to small and medium-scale enterprises in Nigeria, Ghana, Germany, Switzerland, Canada, etc. We are certified management consultants with the International Council of Management Consulting Institutes (CMC-Global) with over 18 years of experience. Our team of experts and consultants have authored over 20 books on business management, business structure, business operations, human resources, organizational structure, employee development, money management, and so on.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Sales Representative is responsible for generating leads, building client relationships, and achieving sales targets.
	This role involves identifying customer needs, presenting suitable products or services, and closing sales to help grow the business.
	An ideal candidate is goal-oriented, persuasive, and has excellent interpersonal skills.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive, process, and confirm customer orders via phone, whatsapp, email, website, and in-person visits.
	Conduct field visits to pharmacies, hospitals, clinics, and distributors to generate new orders.
	Promote company products and communicate ongoing promotions to customers.
	Achieve assigned sales targets and expand customer base.
	Follow up on pending payments and outstanding invoices.
	Maintain accurate records of orders, customer interactions, and sales activities.
	Provide market feedback on competitor pricing and customer demand trends.
	Coordinate with warehouse/logistics to ensure timely order fulfillment.


Qualifications


	Candidates should possess a Degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field is preferred but not always required with 3-5 years of experience
	Proven work experience as a Sales Representative or similar role.
	Highly motivated and target-driven with a proven track record in sales.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to create and deliver presentations tailored to the audience needs.


Salary
N250,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Manager",
  "description": "International Golden Edge Trading (IGET) Limited is an e-commerce startup in Nigeria with operations in different locations in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Manager

Job Locations:&nbsp;Abuja, &amp; Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a driven B2B Sales Manager to drive growth through strategic partnerships with business owners/operators.
	You will build relationships, close deals, and manage accounts to increase our offline revenue target.


Key Responsibilities


	Prospect &amp; Pitch: Identify and engage businessowners/operators to drive channel expansion
	Close Deals: Negotiate sales agreements focusing on deal profitability and ROI for partners
	Manage Accounts: Foster relationships, ensure partner satisfaction, and upsell opportunities
	Drive Sales Quotas: Hit revenue targets through strategic partnerships
	Collaborate Cross-Functionally: Align logistics, marketing, and sales efforts for deal success.


Requirements


	2 - 5 years of B2B sales experience.
	Proven sales track record, ideally in retail/B2B partnerships
	Strong negotiation skills with ability to structure win-win deals
	Relationship-building and account management expertise.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to:&nbsp;gloria@igoldenedge.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Sales Manager Job at International Golden Edge Trading Limited




        
    

        
        International Golden Edge Trading (IGET) Limited is an e-commerce startup in Nigeria with operations in different locations in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Manager

Job Locations: Abuja, & Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a driven B2B Sales Manager to drive growth through strategic partnerships with business owners/operators.
	You will build relationships, close deals, and manage accounts to increase our offline revenue target.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Prospect & Pitch: Identify and engage businessowners/operators to drive channel expansion
	Close Deals: Negotiate sales agreements focusing on deal profitability and ROI for partners
	Manage Accounts: Foster relationships, ensure partner satisfaction, and upsell opportunities
	Drive Sales Quotas: Hit revenue targets through strategic partnerships
	Collaborate Cross-Functionally: Align logistics, marketing, and sales efforts for deal success.


Requirements


	2 - 5 years of B2B sales experience.
	Proven sales track record, ideally in retail/B2B partnerships
	Strong negotiation skills with ability to structure win-win deals
	Relationship-building and account management expertise.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "Training Hub is wholly owned subsidiary that provides a full spectrum of manpower solutions ranging from talent driven outsourcing, staffing solutions, temporary resourcing, permanent placement and apprenticeship/mentorship programmes.

Our team of seasoned professionals manage all aspects of recruitment, pre-screening, testing / interviewing, training and coaching process activities. Our personnel resource persons are positioned for long term on-the-job success. Personnel resources within our database include administration officers, drivers, auditors, logistics officers, procurement expediters, project managers, contact centre and customer service executives, buyers, technicians, engineers, chief executives and other professionals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Maryland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Account Officer supports the organization&rsquo;s financial operations by maintaining accurate financial records, processing transactions, and assisting the Financial Manager with financial analysis and reporting.
	The role also contributes to budget planning and implementation while providing basic administrative support to ensure efficient financial and office operations.


Key Responsibilities
Financial and Accounting Functions:


	Maintain accurate financial records, including general ledger entries, invoices, receipts, and payment documentation.
	Process accounts payable and accounts receivable transactions, ensuring timely payments and proper documentation.
	Prepare and maintain financial records, schedules, and supporting documents for periodic financial reporting.
	Assist in the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.
	Support the Financial Manager with financial analysis, budget tracking, and financial reporting when required.
	Assist in budget preparation, budget planning, and the implementation of approved budgets across operational units.
	Monitor and track expenses against approved budgets and report variances where necessary.
	Conduct bank reconciliations and ensure the accuracy of financial records.
	Maintain proper documentation of all financial transactions to support internal and external audits.
	Ensure compliance with company financial policies, accounting standards, and regulatory requirements.
	Support tax documentation, statutory payments, and financial compliance processes when required.


Administrative Functions:


	Maintain organized filing systems for financial and administrative records (both physical and electronic).
	Assist in preparing financial and administrative documents, reports, and presentations for management meetings.
	Support procurement documentation and track purchase requests, invoices, and vendor payments.
	Coordinate with vendors, suppliers, and service providers regarding financial documentation and payments.
	Assist in maintaining office operational records and administrative documentation.
	Provide administrative support to the finance department and other units when required.


Qualifications and Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree/ HND in Accounting.
	2&ndash;3 years of relevant accounting or finance experience.
	Professional certification (ICAN, ACCA, or ATS) or progress toward certification will be an added advantage.


Skills and Competencies:


	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting practices.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Strong analytical and financial data interpretation skills.
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail.
	Good organizational, documentation, and record-keeping skills.
	Ability to maintain confidentiality when handling financial information.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;humanresources@training-hub.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Account Officer Job at Training Hub Limited




        
    

        
        Training Hub is wholly owned subsidiary that provides a full spectrum of manpower solutions ranging from talent driven outsourcing, staffing solutions, temporary resourcing, permanent placement and apprenticeship/mentorship programmes.

Our team of seasoned professionals manage all aspects of recruitment, pre-screening, testing / interviewing, training and coaching process activities. Our personnel resource persons are positioned for long term on-the-job success. Personnel resources within our database include administration officers, drivers, auditors, logistics officers, procurement expediters, project managers, contact centre and customer service executives, buyers, technicians, engineers, chief executives and other professionals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Territory Development Officer",
  "description": "DAG Industries Nigeria Limited -&nbsp;We provide the most popular range of Bajaj motorcycles, Bajaj tricycles, Bajaj genuine spares, MRF tyres, DAG lubricants and unfaltering after sales service. Backed by its untiring team of professional and trained technicians, authorized service stations and its own service center, DAG has been instrumental in developing Nigeria through building infrastructure and creating jobs thereby providing a livelihood for the common people in Nigeria. We at DAG are committed to provide genuine spare parts, accessories, and a never failing support to its customers and business associates.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Territory Development Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Department: Sales / Business Development
Reports To: Area Sales Manager / Regional Manager

Job Summary


	The Territory Development Officer is responsible for driving sales growth, expanding market presence, and strengthening relationships with dealers, distributors, and customers within an assigned territory.
	The role focuses on identifying new business opportunities, increasing product penetration, and ensuring the achievement of sales targets while maintaining excellent customer service and market intelligence.


Key Responsibilities
Sales and Market Development:


	Achieve monthly and annual sales targets within the assigned territory.
	Identify and develop new business opportunities to expand the company&rsquo;s market share.
	Increase product visibility and distribution across key channels within the territory.
	Implement sales strategies and promotional activities to drive revenue growth.


Dealer and Customer Relationship Management:


	Build and maintain strong relationships with distributors, dealers, and key customers.
	Provide support to partners to ensure product availability and proper market representation.
	Address customer complaints and ensure timely resolution.


Territory Management:


	Plan and execute regular market visits to monitor performance and identify opportunities.
	Monitor competitor activities, pricing strategies, and market trends.
	Ensure proper coverage and penetration of all assigned locations within the territory.


Market Intelligence and Reporting:


	Gather and report market feedback, competitor activities, and customer insights.
	Prepare and submit regular sales and activity reports to management.
	Provide recommendations to improve product positioning and sales performance.


Promotional Activities


	Organize product demonstrations, promotions, and marketing campaigns within the territory.
	Support marketing initiatives to enhance brand awareness.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Sales, or a related field.
	2&ndash;5 years of experience in sales, territory management, or business development.
	Experience in automobile, spare parts, FMCG, or manufacturing industries is an added advantage.
	Strong negotiation, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to analyze market trends and develop effective sales strategies.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
	Willingness to travel frequently within the assigned territory.
	preferably candidate located in Ajah/Agege


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Achievement of sales targets
	Number of new dealers or customers onboarded
	Territory coverage and market expansion
	Customer satisfaction and retention
	Growth in product distribution and market share


Key Competencies:


	Sales and negotiation skills
	Relationship management
	Market analysis
	Strategic thinking
	Time management and organization
	Problem-solving ability


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV &nbsp;to:&nbsp;Kingsley.o@bajajnigeria.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Territory Development Officer Job at DAG Industries Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        DAG Industries Nigeria Limited - We provide the most popular range of Bajaj motorcycles, Bajaj tricycles, Bajaj genuine spares, MRF tyres, DAG lubricants and unfaltering after sales service. Backed by its untiring team of professional and trained technicians, authorized service stations and its own service center, DAG has been instrumental in developing Nigeria through building infrastructure and creating jobs thereby providing a livelihood for the common people in Nigeria. We at DAG are committed to provide genuine spare parts, accessories, and a never failing support to its customers and business associates.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Territory Development Officer
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Department: Sales / Business Development
Reports To: Area Sales Manager / Regional Manager

Job Summary


	The Territory Development Officer is responsible for driving sales growth, expanding market presence, and strengthening relationships with dealers, distributors, and customers within an assigned territory.
	The role focuses on identifying new business opportunities, increasing product penetration, and ensuring the achievement of sales targets while maintaining excellent customer service and market intelligence.


Key Responsibilities
Sales and Market Development:


	Achieve monthly and annual sales targets within the assigned territory.
	Identify and develop new business opportunities to expand the company’s market share.
	Increase product visibility and distribution across key channels within the territory.
	Implement sales strategies and promotional activities to drive revenue growth.


Dealer and Customer Relationship Management:


	Build and maintain strong relationships with distributors, dealers, and key customers.
	Provide support to partners to ensure product availability and proper market representation.
	Address customer complaints and ensure timely resolution.


Territory Management:


	Plan and execute regular market visits to monitor performance and identify opportunities.
	Monitor competitor activities, pricing strategies, and market trends.
	Ensure proper coverage and penetration of all assigned locations within the territory.


Market Intelligence and Reporting:


	Gather and report market feedback, competitor activities, and customer insights.
	Prepare and submit regular sales and activity reports to management.
	Provide recommendations to improve product positioning and sales performance.


Promotional Activities


	Organize product demonstrations, promotions, and marketing campaigns within the territory.
	Support marketing initiatives to enhance brand awareness.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Sales, or a related field.
	2–5 years of experience in sales, territory management, or business development.
	Experience in automobile, spare parts, FMCG, or manufacturing industries is an added advantage.
	Strong negotiation, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to analyze market trends and develop effective sales strategies.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
	Willingness to travel frequently within the assigned territory.
	preferably candidate located in Ajah/Agege


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Achievement of sales targets
	Number of new dealers or customers onboarded
	Territory coverage and market expansion
	Customer satisfaction and retention
	Growth in product distribution and market share


Key Competencies:


	Sales and negotiation skills
	Relationship management
	Market analysis
	Strategic thinking
	Time management and organization
	Problem-solving ability


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV  to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
